failed_attempts.sql: SELECT pr.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.biography_lexemes FROM publication pub JOIN publication_collab pc ON pub.id = pc.publication_id JOIN profile_relationship pr ON (pub.profile_id  = pr.origin_profile_id OR pr.destination_profile_id) AND pr.edge = 'follows' AND pr.destination_profile_id IS NOT NULL JOIN profile p ON (pr.origin_profile_id = p.id OR pr.destination_profile_id = p.id) WHERE pub.slug ILIKE '%Tutto Nhoque%' ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'Restaurant')) DESC LIMIT 10;
